signals.raw:
US-Iran Ceasefire Holds Fragilely Amid Ongoing Pakistan Talks; No Strait of Hormuz Reopening or Major Breakthrough Confirmed** | **NO** | **MED** confidence[1][2][4]

The two-week ceasefire announced Tuesday by President Trump—conditioned on Iran fully reopening the Strait of Hormuz—remains in effect but is strained, with negotiations led by VP J.D. Vance underway in Islamabad as of April 11[1][2]
